title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入津巴布韦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入辛巴威：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Zimbabwe SAZ conformity assessment requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards adopted via SAZ, ZERA generation/storage licensing and net-metering registration requirements, ZETDC grid-connection agreement requirements, local fire authority approval expectations for BESS enclosures, UN 38.3 transport requirements applicable to landlocked routing via Durban or Beira corridors, and Zimbabwe's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB/T 36558-2023 and GB/T 34120-2023 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与津巴布韦SAZ合格评定要求、通过SAZ采纳的IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、ZERA发电/储能许可及净计量注册要求、ZETDC并网协议要求、BESS机柜本地消防主管机关审批要求、经德班或贝拉走廊内陆路线适用的UN 38.3运输要求，以及津巴布韦230/400 V 50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2023基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與辛巴威SAZ合格評定要求、通過SAZ採納的IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、ZERA發電/儲能許可及淨計量注冊要求、ZETDC併網協議要求、BESS機櫃本地消防主管機關審批要求、經德班或貝拉走廊內陸路線適用的UN 38.3運輸要求，以及辛巴威230/400 V 50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2023基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SAZ conformity assessment scope determination, ZERA licensing approval, ZETDC grid-connection approval, local fire authority approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Zimbabwe SAZ Technical Standards, ZERA licensing and net-metering requirements, ZETDC grid-connection technical specifications, local fire authority requirements, UN transport regulations, and mining regulatory (MHTE) requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SAZ合格评定范围裁定、ZERA许可批准、ZETDC并网批准、本地消防主管机关批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行津巴布韦SAZ技术标准、ZERA许可及净计量要求、ZETDC并网技术规格、本地消防主管机关要求、UN运输法规及矿业监管（MHTE）要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SAZ合格評定範圍裁定、ZERA許可批准、ZETDC併網批准、本地消防主管機關批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行辛巴威SAZ技術標準、ZERA許可及淨計量要求、ZETDC併網技術規格、本地消防主管機關要求、UN運輸法規及礦業監管（MHTE）要求。

answer_first.en: Zimbabwe does not have a standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation or Saudi SABER route. The Standards Association of Zimbabwe (SAZ) adopts IEC standards, and IEC 62619 is the internationally expected safety baseline for lithium BESS cells and modules in project specifications. The Zimbabwe Energy Regulatory Authority (ZERA) regulates energy generation and storage through licensing and net-metering registration; ZESA/ZETDC governs grid connection. Zimbabwe's grid operates at 230/400 V 50 Hz — voltage levels differ from China's 220/380 V, requiring PCS reconfiguration. Chronic load-shedding driven by Kariba hydro shortfalls has accelerated solar-plus-storage uptake across C&I, mining (gold, platinum, lithium), and utility segments. The practical compliance gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Zimbabwe are: (1) SAZ conformity assessment recognising IEC certification as the applicable evidence pathway — Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as substitutes; (2) ZERA generation/storage licence and net-metering registration before grid-connected operation; (3) ZETDC grid-connection agreement with PCS configured and validated for Zimbabwe's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid; (4) local fire authority approval for BESS enclosure installation aligned with IEC 62933-5-2 or equivalent fire-safety evidence; (5) UN 38.3 transport test documentation mandatory under IATA/IMDG for the Durban (South Africa) or Beira (Mozambique) import corridors; and (6) MHTE mining regulations for captive systems at mining project sites. Chinese GB/T 36558-2023 and GB/T 34120-2023 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as equivalents in SAZ, ZERA, or project-owner review.
answer_first.zh: 津巴布韦尚无与欧盟《电池法规》或沙特SABER路径相当的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规。津巴布韦标准协会（SAZ）采纳IEC标准，IEC 62619是项目规格中锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全基准。津巴布韦能源监管局（ZERA）通过许可及净计量注册管控能源发电和储能；ZESA/ZETDC负责电网连接监管。津巴布韦电网运行参数为230/400 V 50 Hz——电压水平与中国220/380 V不同，须重新配置储能变流器（PCS）。卡里巴水电短缺导致的长期限电加速了工商业、采矿业（金、铂、锂）及公用事业领域的光储一体化应用。中国BESS出口津巴布韦的实际合规差距包括：（1）SAZ合格评定——以IEC认证作为适用证据路径，中国GB/T标准不被接受为替代依据；（2）并网运营前须取得ZERA发电/储能许可及净计量注册；（3）ZETDC并网协议，PCS须针对津巴布韦230/400 V 50 Hz电网进行配置和验证；（4）BESS机柜安装的本地消防主管机关批准，须符合IEC 62933-5-2或同等消防安全证据；（5）经德班（南非）或贝拉（莫桑比克）进口走廊，IATA/IMDG强制要求的UN 38.3运输测试文件；（6）矿业项目现场自备系统的矿业、矿物和矿业开发部（MHTE）矿业法规。中国GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2023是生产基准，但在SAZ、ZERA或项目业主审查中不被接受为等效依据。
answer_first.zht: 辛巴威尚無與歐盟《電池法規》或沙特SABER路徑相當的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規。辛巴威標準協會（SAZ）採納IEC標準，IEC 62619是項目規格中鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全基準。辛巴威能源監管局（ZERA）通過許可及淨計量注冊管控能源發電和儲能；ZESA/ZETDC負責電網連接監管。辛巴威電網運行參數為230/400 V 50 Hz——電壓水平與中國220/380 V不同，須重新配置儲能變流器（PCS）。卡里巴水電短缺導致的長期限電加速了工商業、採礦業（金、鉑、鋰）及公用事業領域的光儲一體化應用。中國BESS出口辛巴威的實際合規差距包括：（1）SAZ合格評定——以IEC認證作為適用證據路徑，中國GB/T標準不被接受為替代依據；（2）併網運營前須取得ZERA發電/儲能許可及淨計量注冊；（3）ZETDC併網協議，PCS須針對辛巴威230/400 V 50 Hz電網進行配置和驗證；（4）BESS機櫃安裝的本地消防主管機關批准，須符合IEC 62933-5-2或同等消防安全證據；（5）經德班（南非）或貝拉（莫桑比克）進口走廊，IATA/IMDG強制要求的UN 38.3運輸測試文件；（6）礦業項目現場自備系統的礦業、礦物和礦業開發部（MHTE）礦業法規。中國GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2023是製造基準，但在SAZ、ZERA或項目業主審查中不被接受為等效依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
